name: chr2q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 2 q-arm pericentric flank (2q11.1-2q11.2), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Carries the cryptic chimpanzee ancestral telomere-fusion remnant (2q13-2q14 interstitial telomere) distally. Alpha-satellite, pericentromeric SDs, scattered HSat2. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + pericentromeric SD shoreline; ancient ape-fusion q-side; ~1.5 Mb distal lies the 2q13 interstitial-telomere fusion scar.
